violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as shell eggs and raw shrimp) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as vegetables and prepared food items) in 2-door reach-in #1 and #2. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables and during storage. Raw food items were moved to proper storage location during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Deli slicer was disassembled, cleaned, and sanitized during time of inspection. Proper cleaning procedures reviewed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of various dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowls were removed from containers during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

The chest freezer located in the prep area was observed with tape used to repair corner of unit and was not in good repair. Materials used to repair equipment shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Tape was removed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

The individual cutting boards and the cutting board on the kitchen prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors shall be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025
